author: Adam Jensen
message: Remove old workaround for macOS 10.13-era kernel bug
patch:
commit 780a9c1a3e7d5643f03adff1bfb95cd2102f3ff0
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Thu Mar 19 06:49:38 2026 -0400

    Remove old workaround for macOS 10.13-era kernel bug
---
 src/main.rs | 6 ------
 1 file changed, 6 deletions(-)

diff --git a/src/main.rs b/src/main.rs
index 85fcd1b..1c18003 100644
--- a/src/main.rs
+++ b/src/main.rs
@@ -588,12 +588,6 @@ fn spawn_subprocess(
     args: Vec<String>,
     no_drop_root: bool,
 ) -> Result<std::process::Child> {
-    if cfg!(target_os = "macos") {
-        // sleep to prevent freezes (because of High Sierra kernel bug)
-        // TODO: figure out how to work around this race in a cleaner way
-        std::thread::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(10));
-    }
-
     let context = format!("spawn subprocess '{}'", prog.clone());
 
     #[cfg(unix)]

author: Adam Jensen
message: Allow spawned processes to be run for a specific duration

author: Adam Jensen
Adam Jensen
message: CI (bindgen): Install latest stable cargo to get edition2024 support
patch:
commit 588529b5ec915175259f43d999b124ec0d174bb4
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Fri Mar 13 06:47:58 2026 -0400

    CI (bindgen): Install latest stable cargo to get edition2024 support
---
 ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen | 9 +++++----
 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen b/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen
index 2caef6e..87c9f80 100644
--- a/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen
+++ b/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen
@@ -7,16 +7,17 @@ ENV tz=UTC
 RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq --no-install-recommends \
     build-essential \
     ca-certificates \
-    cargo \
-    git \
-    rustc
+    curl \
+    git
+
+RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
   
 COPY Cargo.toml config.toml ./
 COPY src src
 COPY ruby-structs ruby-structs
 COPY xtask xtask
 
-RUN cargo run --release --package xtask
+RUN ~/.cargo/bin/cargo run --release --package xtask
 
 FROM ubuntu:${UBUNTU_VERSION} AS generate

author: Adam Jensen
patch:
commit 91f189ef017a5d3278d3e8fb688ed4912ed073eb
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Mon Mar 9 21:47:19 2026 -0400

    CI: Upgrade freebsd-firecracker-action

author: Adam Jensen
Adam Jensen
patch:
commit 578e7331952d41b55a9bd9b76a881057aa656bb1
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Wed Jan 14 06:22:02 2026 -0500

    Add missing test for ruby 4.0.0
---
 src/core/ruby_version.rs | 19 +++++++++++++++++++
 1 file changed, 19 insertions(+)

diff --git a/src/core/ruby_version.rs b/src/core/ruby_version.rs
index 3f0e681..6c6d64a 100644
--- a/src/core/ruby_version.rs
+++ b/src/core/ruby_version.rs
@@ -3366,6 +3366,25 @@ mod tests {
         assert_eq!(real_stack_trace_3_3_0(), stack_trace.unwrap().trace);
     }
 
+    #[cfg(target_pointer_width = "64")]
+    #[test]
+    fn test_get_ruby_stack_trace_4_0_0() {
+        let source = coredump_4_0_0();
+        let vm_addr = 0x7f43435f4988;
+        let global_symbols_addr = Some(0x7f43435e3c60);
+        let stack_trace = ruby_version::ruby_4_0_0::get_stack_trace::<CoreDump>(
+            0,
+            vm_addr,
+            global_symbols_addr,
+            &source,
+            0,
+            false,
+        )
+        .unwrap()
+        .unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(real_stack_trace_4_0_0(), stack_trace.trace);
+    }
+
     #[rstest]
     #[case::no_class_not_singleton("", "foo", false, "foo")]
     #[case::class_not_singleton("ClassA", "foo", false, "ClassA#foo")]

patch:
commit bc1e7839d628c6e0830b4fb5d5cacf5df74b40de
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Thu Dec 25 11:52:08 2025 -0500

    CI: Run against ruby 4.0.0
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 8 ++++----
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 6097420..d20019f 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -48,22 +48,22 @@ jobs:
         include:
           - build: linux-x86_64
             os: ubuntu-24.04
-            ruby-version: 3.4.8
+            ruby-version: 4.0.0
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: linux-aarch64
             os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
-            ruby-version: 3.4.8
+            ruby-version: 4.0.0
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: macos
             os: macos-14
-            ruby-version: 3.4.8
+            ruby-version: 4.0.0
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
           - build: windows
             os: windows-2022
-            ruby-version: 3.4.7
+            ruby-version: 3.4.8
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
     steps:

 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 7ab6ad3..7b2159d 100644

+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml

         with:
           verbose: false
           pre-run: |

Date:   Tue Oct 21 20:54:57 2025 -0400

    Remove dead code
---
 src/core/ruby_version.rs | 1 -
 1 file changed, 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/src/core/ruby_version.rs b/src/core/ruby_version.rs
index f12f57a..b650b98 100644
--- a/src/core/ruby_version.rs
+++ b/src/core/ruby_version.rs
@@ -1056,7 +1056,6 @@ macro_rules! get_classpath(
 
             const RUBY_QNIL: usize = 0x04;

             let mut singleton = false;
 
             let imemo: rb_method_entry_struct = source.copy_struct(cme).context(cme)?;

patch:
commit 70c01cf44f77d1ee9a8bdae339787934db897bd4
Author: Dale Hamel <dale.hamel@shopify.com>
Date:   Mon Oct 20 15:15:53 2025 -0400

    Style nits in test program
---
 ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb | 12 ++++++------
 1 file changed, 6 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)

diff --git a/ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb b/ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb
index 5928c20..5ad2cc0 100644
--- a/ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb
+++ b/ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb
@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@
 require_relative './interesting_backtrace_helper'
 
 class InstanceMethod
-  def work()
+  def work
     top_level_hello
   end
 end
 
 module ModuleMethod
-  def call_instance()
-      InstanceMethod.new.work()
+  def call_instance
+    InstanceMethod.new.work
   end
 end
 
@@ -17,10 +17,10 @@ class IncludedMethod
 end
 
 # Top level method test too (block in main)
-def work_main()
-  IncludedMethod.new.call_instance()
+def work_main
+  IncludedMethod.new.call_instance
 end
 
 loop do
-    work_main()
+  work_main
 end

patch:
commit 6eb9bbdecfb6869b7c790944216fd60133f6838f
Author: Dale Hamel <dale.hamel@shopify.com>
Date:   Wed Oct 8 10:08:15 2025 -0400

    Update coredump action
---
 .github/workflows/coredump.yml | 6 +++---
 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/coredump.yml b/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
index 4245ad8..1692e9c 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run Ruby script
         id: ruby-script
         run: |
-          ruby ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb &
+          ruby ci/ruby-programs/infinite_on_cpu.rb &
           pid=$!
           echo "pid=$pid" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
@@ -53,8 +53,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Create core dump
         shell: sudo bash {0}
         run: |
-          echo 0x7f > /proc/${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }}/coredump_filter
-          gcore ${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }}
+          echo 0xff > /proc/${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }}/coredump_filter
+          gcore -a ${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }}
           mv core.${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }} ruby-coredump-${{ inputs.ruby-version }}
           gzip -9 ruby-coredump-${{ inputs.ruby-version }}

@@ -1122,7 +1122,7 @@ macro_rules! get_classpath(
         // TODO make some tests for profile_full_label_name to cover the various cases it needs
         // to handle correctly
         // TODO this should be saved in the cache, we shouldn't unconditionally run this
-        fn profile_frame_full_label(
+        pub fn profile_frame_full_label(
             class_path: &str,
             label: &str,
             base_label: &str,
@@ -1131,7 +1131,7 @@ macro_rules! get_classpath(
         ) -> String {
             let qualified = qualified_method_name(class_path, method_name, singleton);
 
-            if qualified.is_empty() || qualified == base_label {
+            if qualified.is_empty() || qualified == base_label.to_string() {
                 return label.to_string();
             }
 
@@ -1451,7 +1451,7 @@ macro_rules! get_cfunc_name(
             Ok((frame_flag & VM_FRAME_MAGIC_MASK) == VM_FRAME_MAGIC_CFUNC)
         }
 
-        fn qualified_method_name(class_path: &str, method_name: &str, singleton: bool) -> String {
+        pub fn qualified_method_name(class_path: &str, method_name: &str, singleton: bool) -> String {
             if method_name.is_empty() {
                 return method_name.to_string();
             }
@@ -1750,6 +1750,7 @@ ruby_version_v3_3_x!(ruby_3_4_7);
 #[cfg(test)]
 mod tests {
     use rbspy_testdata::*;
+    use rstest::rstest;
 
     use crate::core::ruby_version;
     use crate::core::types::StackFrame;
@@ -3227,4 +3228,64 @@ mod tests {
         .unwrap();
         assert_eq!(real_stack_trace_3_3_0(), stack_trace.unwrap().trace);
     }
+
+    #[rstest]
+    #[case::no_class_not_singleton("", "foo", false, "foo")]
+    #[case::class_not_singleton("ClassA", "foo", false, "ClassA#foo")]
+    #[case::class_with_singleton("ClassA", "foo", true, "ClassA.foo")]
+    #[case::empty_returns_empty("", "", false, "")]
+    fn test_qualified_method_name(
+        #[case] class_path: &str,
+        #[case] method_name: &str,
+        #[case] singleton: bool,
+        #[case] expected: &str,
+    ) {
+        let qualified =
+            ruby_version::ruby_3_3_0::qualified_method_name(class_path, method_name, singleton);
+        assert_eq!(expected.to_string(), qualified);
+    }
+    #[rstest]
+    #[case::no_class_uses_label("", "block in foo", "foo", "foo", false, "block in foo")]
+    #[case::no_method_uses_label("", "block in foo", "foo", "", false, "block in foo")]
+    #[case::no_class_no_base_label_no_method_uses_label(
+        "",
+        "block in foo",
+        "",
+        "",
+        false,
+        "block in foo"
+    )]
+    #[case::class_uses_label_prefix(
+        "ClassA",
+        "block in foo",
+        "foo",
+        "foo",
+        false,
+        "block in ClassA#foo"
+    )]
+    #[case::class_uses_label_prefix_singleton(
+        "ClassA",
+        "block in foo",
+        "foo",
+        "foo",
+        true,
+        "block in ClassA.foo"
+    )]
+    fn test_profile_frame_full_label(
+        #[case] class_path: &str,
+        #[case] label: &str,
+        #[case] base_label: &str,
+        #[case] method_name: &str,
+        #[case] singleton: bool,
+        #[case] expected: &str,
+    ) {
+        let full_label = ruby_version::ruby_3_3_0::profile_frame_full_label(
+            class_path,
+            label,
+            base_label,
+            method_name,
+            singleton,
+        );
+        assert_eq!(expected.to_string(), full_label);
+    }
 }

patch:
commit 5d4dce80486a09e4240ad88b4137829ba7a057a7
Author: Dale Hamel <dale.hamel@shopify.com>
Date:   Mon Oct 6 20:11:57 2025 -0400

    Add more complex class example
---
 .github/workflows/coredump.yml                   |   7 +-
 ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb           |  26 +++
 ci/ruby-programs/interesting_backtrace_helper.rb | 215 +++++++++++++++++++++++
 3 files changed, 245 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/coredump.yml b/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
index 82387d5..4245ad8 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
@@ -40,19 +40,20 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run Ruby script
         id: ruby-script
         run: |
-          ruby ci/ruby-programs/infinite_on_cpu.rb &
+          ruby ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb &
           pid=$!
           echo "pid=$pid" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Inspect process
         run: sudo ./target/release/rbspy inspect --pid ${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }}
 
+      # default coredump filter is 0x33, update it to basically dump all memory here
+      # to best mimic the real process otherwise heap data like strings may not
+      # be accessible
       - name: Create core dump
         shell: sudo bash {0}
         run: |
-          cat /proc/${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }}/coredump_filter
           echo 0x7f > /proc/${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }}/coredump_filter
-          cat /proc/${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }}/coredump_filter
           gcore ${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }}
           mv core.${{ steps.ruby-script.outputs.pid }} ruby-coredump-${{ inputs.ruby-version }}
           gzip -9 ruby-coredump-${{ inputs.ruby-version }}
diff --git a/ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb b/ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5928c20
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ci/ruby-programs/cme_complex_labels.rb
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+require_relative './interesting_backtrace_helper'
+
+class InstanceMethod
+  def work()
+    top_level_hello
+  end
+end
+
+module ModuleMethod
+  def call_instance()
+      InstanceMethod.new.work()
+  end
+end
+
+class IncludedMethod
+  include ModuleMethod
+end
+
+# Top level method test too (block in main)
+def work_main()
+  IncludedMethod.new.call_instance()
+end
+
+loop do
+    work_main()
+end
diff --git a/ci/ruby-programs/interesting_backtrace_helper.rb b/ci/ruby-programs/interesting_backtrace_helper.rb
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5352390
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ci/ruby-programs/interesting_backtrace_helper.rb
@@ -0,0 +1,215 @@
+# frozen_string_literal: true
+
+# backtracie: Ruby gem for beautiful backtraces
+# Copyright (C) 2021 Ivo Anjo <ivo@ivoanjo.me>
+#
+# This file is part of backtracie.
+#
+# backtracie is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify
+# it under the terms of the GNU Lesser General Public License as published by
+# the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or
+# (at your option) any later version.
+#
+# backtracie is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,
+# but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of
+# MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.  See the
+# GNU Lesser General Public License for more details.
+#
+# You should have received a copy of the GNU Lesser General Public License
+# along with backtracie.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
+
+# The following tries to reproduce the most interesting (contrived?) call stack I can think of, with as many weird
+# variants as possible.
+#
+# It is implemented as a separate thread that receives procs to execute and writes back their results. It on purpose
+# executes at the top-level, so we can see cases where methods are called on the "main" object.
+
+SAMPLE_REQUESTS_QUEUE = Queue.new
+SAMPLE_RESPONSES_QUEUE = Queue.new
+
+def sample_interesting_backtrace(&block)
+  SAMPLE_REQUESTS_QUEUE.push(block)
+  SAMPLE_RESPONSES_QUEUE.pop
+end
+
+# ----
+
+class ClassA
+  def hello
+    loop do
+      sleep 0.5
+    end
+  end
+end
+
+module ModuleB
+  class ClassB < ClassA
+    def hello
+      super
+    end
+  end
+end
+
+module ModuleC
+  def self.hello
+    ModuleB::ClassB.new.hello
+  end
+end
+
+class ClassWithStaticMethod
+  def self.hello
+    ModuleC.hello
+  end
+end
+
+module ModuleD
+  def hello
+    ClassWithStaticMethod.hello
+  end
+end
+
+class ClassC
+  include ModuleD
+end
+
+$a_proc = proc { ClassC.new.hello }
+
+$a_lambda = lambda { $a_proc.call }
+
+class ClassD; end
+
+$class_d_object = ClassD.new
+
+def $class_d_object.hello
+  $a_lambda.call
+end
+
+class ClassE
+  def hello
+    $class_d_object.hello
+  end
+end
+
+class ClassG
+  def hello
+    raise "This should not be called"
+  end
+end
+
+module ContainsRefinement
+  module RefinesClassG
+    refine ClassG do
+      def hello
+        if RUBY_VERSION >= "2.7.0"
+          ClassE.instance_method(:hello).bind_call(ClassF.new)
+        else
+          ClassE.instance_method(:hello).bind(ClassF.new).call
+        end
+      end
+    end
+  end
+end
+
+module ModuleE
+  using ContainsRefinement::RefinesClassG
+
+  def self.hello
+    ClassG.new.hello
+  end
+end
+
+class ClassH
+  def method_missing(name, *_)
+    super unless name == :hello
+
+    ModuleE.hello
+  end
+end
+
+class ClassF < ClassE
+  def hello(arg1, arg2, test1, test2)
+    1.times {
+      ClassH.new.hello
+    }
+  end
+end
+
+ClassI = Class.new do
+  define_method(:hello) do
+    ClassF.new.hello(0, 1, 2, 3)
+  end
+end
+
+$singleton_class = Object.new.singleton_class
+
+def $singleton_class.hello
+  ClassI.new.hello
+end
+
+$anonymous_instance = Class.new do
+  def hello
+    $singleton_class.hello
+  end
+end.new
+
+$anonymous_module = Module.new do
+  def self.hello
+    $anonymous_instance.hello
+  end
+end
+
+def method_with_complex_parameters(a, b = nil, *c, (d), f:, g: nil, **h, &i)
+  $anonymous_module.hello
+end
+
+class ClassJ
+  def hello_helper
+    yield
+  end
+
+  def hello
+    hello_helper do
+      hello_helper do
+        method_with_complex_parameters(0, 1, 2, [3, 4], f: 5, g: 6, h: 7, &proc {})
+      end
+    end
+  end
+end
+
+class ClassK
+  def hello
+    eval("ClassJ.new.hello", binding, __FILE__, __LINE__)
+  end
+end
+
+class ClassL
+  def hello
+    ClassK.new.send(:instance_eval, "hello")
+  end
+end
+
+class ClassM
+  def hello
+    ClassL.new.send(:eval, "hello")
+  end
+end
+
+ClassN = Class.new do
+  define_method(:hello) do
+    1.times {
+      ClassM.new.hello
+    }
+  end
+end
+
+def top_level_hello
+  ClassN.new.hello
+end
+
+SAMPLE_BACKGROUND_THREAD = Thread.new do
+  1.times {
+    1.times {
+      eval("top_level_hello()")
+    }
+  }
+end

commit d6cae74f2ff84f1c9af9989538ba10fcd5a9e99a
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun Sep 28 11:40:30 2025 -0400

    CI: Install missing rustfmt component
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 2 ++
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 16ccf5d..7ab6ad3 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -23,6 +23,8 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Install Rust
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@4305c38b25d97ef35a8ad1f985ccf2d2242004f2 # stable branch
+      - name: Install rustfmt
+        run: rustup component add rustfmt
       - name: Run cargo fmt
         run: |
           cargo fmt --all -- --check

author: Adam Jensen
Adam Jensen
patch:
commit 0db9e78248779f3b68d9df1796529764679aaf98
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Wed Sep 17 17:29:11 2025 -0400

    CI: Run against ruby 3.4.6
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 8 ++++----
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index cd16443..16ccf5d 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -46,22 +46,22 @@ jobs:
         include:
           - build: linux-x86_64
             os: ubuntu-24.04
-            ruby-version: 3.4.4
+            ruby-version: 3.4.6
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: linux-aarch64
             os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
-            ruby-version: 3.4.4
+            ruby-version: 3.4.6
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: macos
             os: macos-14
-            ruby-version: 3.4.4
+            ruby-version: 3.4.6
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
           - build: windows
             os: windows-2022
-            ruby-version: 3.4.4
+            ruby-version: 3.4.5
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
     steps:

message: CI: Fix cross install failure when there's a partial cache hit
patch:
commit 89f8c666f919ac78560274b579d42f765070b41a
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sat Aug 30 21:21:54 2025 -0400

    CI: Fix cross install failure when there's a partial cache hit
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 7 +++++--
 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 149e881..cd16443 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -193,8 +193,11 @@ jobs:
             ${{ runner.os }}-cross-
 
       - name: Install cross
-        if: steps.cache-cross.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
-        run: cargo install cross --git https://github.com/cross-rs/cross --rev 51f46f296253d8122c927c5bb933e3c4f27cc317
+        run: |
+          if [ ! -f "$HOME/.cargo/bin/cross" ]; then
+            cargo install cross --git https://github.com/cross-rs/cross --rev 51f46f296253d8122c927c5bb933e3c4f27cc317
+          fi
+          cross --version
 
       - name: Cargo Cache
         uses: actions/cache@v4

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Cache cross binary and cargo packages
patch:
commit d295f4c42f93f682284aa57797026caef6babcf6
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sat Jul 26 18:07:34 2025 -0400

    CI: Cache cross binary and cargo packages
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 26 ++++++++++++++++++++++++--
 1 file changed, 24 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 2122e98..149e881 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -182,10 +182,32 @@ jobs:
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.8
 
+      - name: Cache cross binary
+        id: cache-cross
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/bin/cross
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cross-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.toml') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cross-
+
+      - name: Install cross
+        if: steps.cache-cross.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
+        run: cargo install cross --git https://github.com/cross-rs/cross --rev 51f46f296253d8122c927c5bb933e3c4f27cc317
+
+      - name: Cargo Cache
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.toml') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
+
       - name: Cross-compile rbspy
         run: |
-          cargo install cross --git https://github.com/cross-rs/cross --rev 51f46f296253d8122c927c5bb933e3c4f27cc317
-
           cross build --release --target x86_64-unknown-freebsd
           cp target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/rbspy rbspy
           rm -rf target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/deps/rbspy-*

Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Thu Jul 24 18:27:04 2025 -0400

    CI: Simplify logic for choosing Docker and ruby system versions

author: Dmytro Shteflyuk
message: Generate one checksum file per each artifact
patch:
commit 2f29f4e0c3467ce2681f61bb0c2076f24c90f996
Author: Dmytro Shteflyuk <kpumuk@kpumuk.info>
Date:   Mon May 26 17:20:49 2025 -0400

    Generate one checksum file per each artifact
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 4 +++-
 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 2b5b40e..3d074ec 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -296,7 +296,9 @@ jobs:
           set -euo pipefail
 
           cd archives
-          sha256sum * > checksums.txt
+          for file in *; do
+            sha256sum "$file" | awk '{print $1}' > "$file.sha256"
+          done
 
       - uses: marvinpinto/action-automatic-releases@919008cf3f741b179569b7a6fb4d8860689ab7f0 # v1.1.1
         with:

author: Dmytro Shteflyuk
message: Calculate checksums for the binary artifacts
patch:
commit 216df3d3f1c0d39827c2cf5a0fcb8b1483f32262
Author: Dmytro Shteflyuk <kpumuk@kpumuk.info>
Date:   Wed Apr 23 17:25:38 2025 -0400

    Calculate checksums for the binary artifacts
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 7 +++++++
 1 file changed, 7 insertions(+)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index bad0490..2b5b40e 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -291,6 +291,13 @@ jobs:
             fi
           done
 
+      - name: Calculate checksums
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+
+          cd archives
+          sha256sum * > checksums.txt
+
       - uses: marvinpinto/action-automatic-releases@919008cf3f741b179569b7a6fb4d8860689ab7f0 # v1.1.1
         with:
           repo_token: "${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}"

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Download cross binary from upstream instead of the vendored version
patch:
commit 9a162a67638d2e4cfc17de6a70651ca606bcfb26
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun May 25 21:25:28 2025 -0400

    CI: Download cross binary from upstream instead of the vendored version
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 4 +---
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index f3fb519..bad0490 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -184,9 +184,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Cross-compile rbspy
         run: |
-          wget -q -O cross https://github.com/acj/freebsd-firecracker/releases/download/v0.3.0/cross
-          chmod +x cross
-          mv cross /usr/local/bin/cross
+          cargo install cross --git https://github.com/cross-rs/cross --rev 51f46f296253d8122c927c5bb933e3c4f27cc317
 
           cross build --release --target x86_64-unknown-freebsd
           cp target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/rbspy rbspy

message: CI: Retire Homebrew workflow now that we're on BrewTestBot's auto-bump list
patch:
commit 8d501946f75335154c493473ae91f1e7de356345
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun May 18 16:15:21 2025 -0400

    CI: Retire Homebrew workflow now that we're on BrewTestBot's auto-bump list
---
 .github/workflows/publish-homebrew.yml | 30 ------------------------------
 1 file changed, 30 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/publish-homebrew.yml b/.github/workflows/publish-homebrew.yml
deleted file mode 100644
index 41e6616..0000000
--- a/.github/workflows/publish-homebrew.yml
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,30 +0,0 @@
-name: Bump Homebrew Formula
-
-on:
-  workflow_dispatch:
-    inputs:
-      tag:
-        description: "Git tag"
-        required: true
-      revision:
-        description: "Git revision"
-        required: true
-  release:
-    types: [published]
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-
-jobs:
-  bump-formula-pr:
-    name: Bump Homebrew formula
-    runs-on: macos-14
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - name: Update Homebrew formula
-        uses: dawidd6/action-homebrew-bump-formula@75ed025ff3ad1d617862838b342b06d613a0ddf3 # 3.10.1
-        with:
-          token: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
-          formula: rbspy
-          tag: ${{ inputs.tag || github.ref }}
-          revision: ${{ inputs.revision || github.sha }}

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Use ruby 3.4.3 for running tests
patch:
commit c6ef1bf4fe4957b5050de49041b6e86389e5efa5
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun May 18 12:39:26 2025 -0400

    CI: Use ruby 3.4.3 for running tests
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml     | 8 ++++----
 ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen | 2 +-
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 0122f4c..36ebc2b 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -46,22 +46,22 @@ jobs:
         include:
           - build: linux-x86_64
             os: ubuntu-24.04
-            ruby-version: 3.4.1
+            ruby-version: 3.4.3
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: linux-aarch64
             os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
-            ruby-version: 3.4.1
+            ruby-version: 3.4.3
             run-tests: 'false'
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: macos
             os: macos-14
-            ruby-version: 3.4.1
+            ruby-version: 3.4.3
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
           - build: windows
             os: windows-2022
-            ruby-version: 3.4.1
+            ruby-version: 3.4.3

             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
     steps:

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Build linux-aarch64 on ARM runners
patch:
commit 968b644577e9fa9a9ce95e16624c127d8cf76754
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun May 18 12:36:19 2025 -0400

    CI: Build linux-aarch64 on ARM runners
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 11 ++++-------
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 338821a..0122f4c 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ jobs:
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: linux-aarch64
-            os: ubuntu-24.04
+            os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
             ruby-version: 3.4.1
             run-tests: 'false'
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
@@ -76,10 +76,6 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install Rust toolchain target
         run: |
           rustup target add ${{ matrix.target }}
-      - name: Install cross-compile toolchain
-        if: matrix.target == 'aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu'
-        run: |
-          sudo apt update -qq && sudo apt install -qq -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu
       - name: Cargo Cache
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.8
         with:
@@ -133,8 +129,9 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           set -e
           sudo apt install -y libjemalloc2 libtcmalloc-minimal4
-          target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/rbspy record env LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjemalloc.so.2 ruby ci/ruby-programs/short_program.rb
-          target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/rbspy record env LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtcmalloc_minimal.so.4 ruby ci/ruby-programs/short_program.rb
+          os_triple="$(echo ${{ matrix.target }} | sed 's/unknown-linux-gnu/linux-gnu/')"
+          target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/rbspy record env LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/$os_triple/libjemalloc.so.2 ruby ci/ruby-programs/short_program.rb
+          target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/rbspy record env LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/$os_triple/libtcmalloc_minimal.so.4 ruby ci/ruby-programs/short_program.rb
 
   build-linux-cross:
     name: Build

message: CI: Upgrade Swatinem/rust-cache to 2.7.8 to fix deprecation warnings
patch:
commit 8a0c48b54a9222082d7cf4e7e160c20a01b8286c
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun May 18 12:13:24 2025 -0400

    CI: Upgrade Swatinem/rust-cache to 2.7.8 to fix deprecation warnings
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml       | 6 +++---
 .github/workflows/coredump.yml | 2 +-
 2 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index d94595b..316f11c 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sudo apt update -qq && sudo apt install -qq -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu
       - name: Cargo Cache
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.3
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.8
         with:
           cache-on-failure: "true"
           key: "${{ matrix.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}"
@@ -158,7 +158,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Cargo Cache
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.3
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.8
         with:
           prefix-key: "20230109"
       - name: Build
@@ -183,7 +183,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install Rust
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@d388a4836fcdbde0e50e395dc79a2670ccdef13f # stable branch
 
-      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.3
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.8
 
       - name: Cross-compile rbspy
         run: |
diff --git a/.github/workflows/coredump.yml b/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
index a31b416..c6f3533 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Cargo Cache
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.3
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.8
         with:
           prefix-key: "20230109"

author: Adam Jensen
message: Fix "Formatting argument out of range" error in rust 1.87+

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Use more recent system ruby when testing latest version
patch:
commit 239676fffac4b2b38bca232882bab01c678687c8
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun May 18 07:53:24 2025 -0400

    CI: Use more recent system ruby when testing latest version
---
 .github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml | 13 +++++++++++--
 1 file changed, 11 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml b/.github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml
index 8936e2f..8c2c82b 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml
@@ -8,6 +8,10 @@ on:
         description: 'Ruby commit to test'
         required: true
         default: 'master'
+      system_ruby_version:
+        description: 'System Ruby version to test against'
+        required: false
+        default: '3.4.4'
       bisect_good:
         description: 'Healthy Ruby commit to end bisecting at'
         required: false
@@ -21,15 +25,20 @@ permissions:
 jobs:
   ruby-latest:
     name: Test rbspy with upstream Ruby's main branch
-    runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
+    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
     timeout-minutes: 60
     env:
       MAKEFLAGS: -j4
-      RUBY_LATEST_STABLE_VERSION: 3.3.0
+      RUBY_LATEST_STABLE_VERSION: 3.4.3
       RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
     steps:
       - name: Install Rust
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@d388a4836fcdbde0e50e395dc79a2670ccdef13f # stable branch
+      - name: Install Ruby
+        uses: ruby/setup-ruby@v1
+        with:
+          ruby-version: "${{ inputs.system_ruby_version }}"
+          bundler-cache: false
       - name: Check out latest Ruby source
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:

    Prepare v0.33.0 release

 Cargo.toml              | 4 ++--
 ruby-structs/Cargo.toml | 2 +-

 4 files changed, 7 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/Cargo.lock b/Cargo.lock
index fe9ca79..b618dce 100644
--- a/Cargo.lock
+++ b/Cargo.lock
@@ -992,7 +992,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rbspy"
-version = "0.32.0"
+version = "0.33.0"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "byteorder",
@@ -1028,7 +1028,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rbspy-ruby-structs"
-version = "0.32.0"
+version = "0.33.0"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rbspy-testdata"
@@ -1632,7 +1632,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "xtask"
-version = "0.32.0"
+version = "0.33.0"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "bindgen 0.71.1",
diff --git a/Cargo.toml b/Cargo.toml
index 0197042..0f0296e 100644
--- a/Cargo.toml
+++ b/Cargo.toml
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "rbspy"
-version = "0.32.0"
+version = "0.33.0"
 authors = ["Adam Jensen <acjensen@gmail.com>", "Julia Evans <julia@jvns.ca>"]
 description = "Sampling CPU profiler for Ruby"
 keywords = ["ruby", "profiler", "MRI"]
@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ memmap2 = "0.9.5"
 proc-maps = "0.4.0"
 prost = "0.13.4"
 rand = "0.9.0"
-rbspy-ruby-structs = { path = "ruby-structs", version="0.32.0" }
+rbspy-ruby-structs = { path = "ruby-structs", version="0.33.0" }
 remoteprocess = "0.5.0"
 semver = "1.0.25"
 serde = "1.0.216"
diff --git a/ruby-structs/Cargo.toml b/ruby-structs/Cargo.toml
index 39657be..225e379 100644
--- a/ruby-structs/Cargo.toml
+++ b/ruby-structs/Cargo.toml
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "rbspy-ruby-structs"
-version = "0.32.0"
+version = "0.33.0"
 authors = ["Adam Jensen <acjensen@gmail.com>", "Julia Evans <julia@jvns.ca>"]
 description = "Helper crate for rbspy. Contains Rust bindings for various internal Ruby structures for version 1.9.3 to 3.x."
 license = "MIT"
diff --git a/xtask/Cargo.toml b/xtask/Cargo.toml
index c12406b..d15baf3 100644
--- a/xtask/Cargo.toml
+++ b/xtask/Cargo.toml
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "xtask"
-version = "0.32.0"
+version = "0.33.0"
 edition = "2021"
 
 # See more keys and their definitions at https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/reference/manifest.html

author: Adam Jensen
message: Add workaround for FreeBSD package version warning
patch:
commit 77dfd7d9cfe1302af59798a0ca38a5332aaa302e
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Mon Apr 14 21:44:18 2025 -0400

    Add workaround for FreeBSD package version warning
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 3 +++
 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 6db31f6..d94595b 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -238,6 +238,9 @@ jobs:
             mkdir -p /home/runner
             ln -s $(pwd)/.cargo /home/runner/.cargo
 
+            # Workaround for package mismatch warning when new releases come out
+            export IGNORE_OSVERSION=yes
+
             pkg install -y ruby
 
             ./rbspy --version

Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Fix apt's unstable API warning
patch:
commit 9a86bd535f3d6e1ec4b7ccb0afc91cfb300dd505
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Mon Feb 17 09:22:43 2025 -0500

    CI: Fix apt's unstable API warning
---
 ci/docker/Dockerfile.containers | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/ci/docker/Dockerfile.containers b/ci/docker/Dockerfile.containers
index 8a8676e..56685cd 100644
--- a/ci/docker/Dockerfile.containers
+++ b/ci/docker/Dockerfile.containers
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ FROM ubuntu:noble-20250127 AS gnu
 ARG TARGETPLATFORM
 ARG VERSION
 
-RUN apt update -qq && apt install -y -qq wget
+RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq wget
 RUN case $TARGETPLATFORM in \
   "linux/amd64") \
     arch=x86_64 \

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Clarify purpose of container dockerfile
patch:
commit 1e81e7bc0ea3e5aedc4295c7d26ef64c1cae29db
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Mon Feb 17 09:19:20 2025 -0500

    CI: Clarify purpose of container dockerfile
---
 .github/workflows/publish-docker-images.yml     | 4 ++--
 ci/docker/{Dockerfile => Dockerfile.containers} | 0
 2 files changed, 2 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/publish-docker-images.yml b/.github/workflows/publish-docker-images.yml
index 2b43efd..ae26c10 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/publish-docker-images.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/publish-docker-images.yml
@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           build-args: VERSION=${{ env.release_version }}
           context: .
-          file: ci/docker/Dockerfile
+          file: ci/docker/Dockerfile.containers
           platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
           push: true
           tags: ${{ env.image_tags }}
@@ -102,7 +102,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           build-args: VERSION=${{ env.release_version }}
           context: .
-          file: ci/docker/Dockerfile
+          file: ci/docker/Dockerfile.containers
           platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
           push: true
           tags: ${{ env.image_tags }}

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Don't fail the binding build if everything is up to date
patch:
commit eda5ab58621e7e72cb411910d44d62d99d53197c
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun Feb 16 20:42:55 2025 -0500

    CI: Don't fail the binding build if everything is up to date
---
 .github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml | 10 +++++++++-
 1 file changed, 9 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml b/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
index 8afad36..726a1f3 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
@@ -433,9 +433,17 @@ jobs:
             fetch-depth: 0
       - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
       - name: Copy bindings into place
+        id: copy-bindings
         run: |
-          cp bindings-*/ruby*.rs rbspy/ruby-structs/src/
+          if cp bindings-*/ruby*.rs rbspy/ruby-structs/src/; then
+            echo "generated_bindings=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "No new bindings were generated. Everything is up to date."
+            echo "generated_bindings=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+            exit 0
+          fi
       - name: Create branch
+        if: steps.copy-bindings.outputs.generated_bindings == 'true'
         run: |
           # Configure git just enough that it can push branches
           cat <<- EOF > $HOME/.netrc

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Future-proof binding generation by migrating to containerized builds
patch:
commit 8dcdb45205fff8a8509eaec331e4535bca7cd6ed
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun Feb 16 16:50:06 2025 -0500

    CI: Future-proof binding generation by migrating to containerized builds
---
 .github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml | 362 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++---
 ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen        |  20 +-
 2 files changed, 353 insertions(+), 29 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml b/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
index 17e77ba..8afad36 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
@@ -23,19 +23,19 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
-      - name: Install Rust
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@d388a4836fcdbde0e50e395dc79a2670ccdef13f # stable branch
       - name: Build xtask
-        run: cargo xtask
+        run: |
+          docker build -t xtask -f ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen --target=builder .
+          docker run --rm -v $PWD:/workdir xtask cp target/release/xtask /workdir/xtask.bin
       - name: Upload xtask binary
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: xtask
-          path: target/release/xtask
+          path: xtask.bin
 
   generate:
     name: Generate Ruby bindings
-    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
     needs: [xtask]
     timeout-minutes: 20
     env:
@@ -62,39 +62,353 @@ jobs:
           3_3_0, 3_3_1, 3_3_2, 3_3_3, 3_3_4, 3_3_5, 3_3_6, 3_3_7,
           3_4_0, 3_4_1, 3_4_2
         ]
-        os: ["ubuntu-20.04"]
+        docker-ubuntu-version: ["20.04"]
         target: ["x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"]
+        include:
+          - ruby-version: 1_9_3_551
+            ubuntu-version: 20.04
+            ruby-system-version: 2.7.0
+          - ruby-version: 2_0_0_648
+            ubuntu-version: 20.04
+            ruby-system-version: 2.7.0
+          - ruby-version: 2_1_0
+            ubuntu-version: 20.04
+            ruby-system-version: 2.7.0
+          - ruby-version: 2_1_1
+            ubuntu-version: 20.04
+            ruby-system-version: 2.7.0
+          - ruby-version: 2_1_2
+            ubuntu-version: 20.04
+            ruby-system-version: 2.7.0
+          - ruby-version: 2_1_3
+            ubuntu-version: 20.04
+            ruby-system-version: 2.7.0
+          - ruby-version: 2_1_4
+            ubuntu-version: 20.04
+            ruby-system-version: 2.7.0

     steps:
       - name: Checkout rbspy repository
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
             path: "rbspy"
-      - name: Install Rust
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@d388a4836fcdbde0e50e395dc79a2670ccdef13f # stable branch
-      - name: Install Rust toolchain target
-        run: |
-          rustup target add ${{ matrix.target }}
-      - name: Install Ruby
-        if: startsWith(matrix.ruby-version, '2_4')
-        uses: ruby/setup-ruby@v1
-        with:
-          ruby-version: 2.7.0
-      - name: Install Ruby
-        if: startsWith(matrix.ruby-version, '2_4') == false
-        uses: ruby/setup-ruby@v1
-        with:
-          ruby-version: 3.3.6
       - name: Download xtask binary
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: xtask
+          path: xtask
       - name: Generate bindings for ruby ${{ matrix.ruby-version }}
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
 
-          cd $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/rbspy
-          chmod u+x ../xtask
-          ../xtask bindgen v${{ matrix.ruby-version }}
+          chmod +x xtask/xtask.bin
+
+          cd rbspy
+
+          docker build -t xtask -f ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen --target=generate --build-arg UBUNTU_VERSION=${{ matrix.docker-ubuntu-version }} --build-arg RUBY_VERSION=${{ matrix.ruby-system-version }} .
+          docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/../xtask/xtask.bin:/xtask -v $PWD/ruby-structs:/ruby-structs xtask v${{ matrix.ruby-version }}
 
           mkdir ../bindings-staging
           # Add new files to the index so that they get picked up
diff --git a/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen b/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen
index 4111d24..dfb9dc8 100644
--- a/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen
+++ b/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen
@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
-FROM ubuntu:20.04 AS builder-22.04
+ARG UBUNTU_VERSION=20.04
+FROM ubuntu:${UBUNTU_VERSION} AS builder
 
 ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
 ENV tz=UTC
@@ -17,21 +18,30 @@ COPY xtask xtask
 
 RUN cargo run --release --package xtask
 
-FROM ubuntu:20.04 AS generate-22.04
+FROM ubuntu:${UBUNTU_VERSION} AS generate
+
+ARG RUBY_VERSION=3.4.2
 
 ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
 ENV tz=UTC
 
 RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq \
-    autoconf autogen build-essential clang llvm \
+    autoconf autogen bash bison build-essential clang curl flex llvm \
+    libssl-dev libreadline-dev zlib1g-dev libyaml-dev libreadline-dev libncurses5-dev libffi-dev libgdbm-dev \
     ca-certificates \
     git \
     ruby ruby-dev \
     rubygems \
     rustfmt
 
-COPY --from=builder-22.04 target/release/xtask /usr/local/bin/xtask
+SHELL ["/bin/bash", "-c"]
+ENV PATH="/root/.rbenv/bin:/root/.rbenv/shims:${PATH}"
+
+RUN curl -fsSL https://github.com/rbenv/rbenv-installer/raw/HEAD/bin/rbenv-installer | bash && \
+    ~/.rbenv/bin/rbenv init && \
+    rbenv install ${RUBY_VERSION} && \
+    rbenv global ${RUBY_VERSION}
 
 RUN mkdir -p ruby-structs/src
 
-ENTRYPOINT ["xtask", "bindgen"]
\ No newline at end of file
+ENTRYPOINT ["/xtask", "bindgen"]

author: Adam Jensen
patch:
commit 201a5071f006be267507093857b407a4b0d6cc0c
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sun Feb 16 16:12:00 2025 -0500

    Add dockerfile for binding generation
---
 .dockerignore                |  5 +++++
 ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen | 37 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 42 insertions(+)

diff --git a/.dockerignore b/.dockerignore
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f492c3a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.dockerignore
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+target
+**/Dockerfile*
+.git
+.gitignore
+ci
diff --git a/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen b/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4111d24
--- /dev/null
+++ b/ci/docker/Dockerfile.bindgen
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+FROM ubuntu:20.04 AS builder-22.04
+
+ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
+ENV tz=UTC
+
+RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq --no-install-recommends \
+    build-essential \
+    ca-certificates \
+    cargo \
+    git \
+    rustc
+  
+COPY Cargo.toml config.toml ./
+COPY src src
+COPY ruby-structs ruby-structs
+COPY xtask xtask
+
+RUN cargo run --release --package xtask
+
+FROM ubuntu:20.04 AS generate-22.04
+
+ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
+ENV tz=UTC
+
+RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq \
+    autoconf autogen build-essential clang llvm \
+    ca-certificates \
+    git \
+    ruby ruby-dev \
+    rubygems \
+    rustfmt
+
+COPY --from=builder-22.04 target/release/xtask /usr/local/bin/xtask
+
+RUN mkdir -p ruby-structs/src
+
+ENTRYPOINT ["xtask", "bindgen"]
\ No newline at end of file

author: Adam Jensen
GitHub Actions
Adam Jensen
message: CI: Use ruby 3.4.0 for Windows tests
patch:
commit f1b825f615c39d847b72dbd45426703ad47fa7c9
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Wed Jan 15 17:33:33 2025 -0500

    CI: Use ruby 3.4.0 for Windows tests
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 8 ++++----
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 5aba715..6db31f6 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -46,22 +46,22 @@ jobs:
         include:
           - build: linux-x86_64
             os: ubuntu-22.04
-            ruby-version: 3.4.0
+            ruby-version: 3.4.1
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: linux-aarch64
             os: ubuntu-22.04
-            ruby-version: 3.4.0
+            ruby-version: 3.4.1
             run-tests: 'false'
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: macos
             os: macos-14
-            ruby-version: 3.4.0
+            ruby-version: 3.4.1
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
           - build: windows
             os: windows-2022
-            ruby-version: 3.3.6
+            ruby-version: 3.4.1
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
     steps:

author: Adam Jensen
patch:
commit 1eacb4f3da1ffb3c04c26ead49297591eddcb2f2
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Wed Dec 25 21:19:39 2024 -0500

    Prepare v0.28.0 release
---
 Cargo.lock              | 6 +++---
 Cargo.toml              | 4 ++--
 ruby-structs/Cargo.toml | 2 +-

diff --git a/Cargo.lock b/Cargo.lock
index 8d18435..3e95bdb 100644
--- a/Cargo.lock
+++ b/Cargo.lock
@@ -930,7 +930,7 @@ dependencies = [

-version = "0.27.0"
+version = "0.28.0"

  "anyhow",
  "byteorder",
@@ -966,7 +966,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rbspy-ruby-structs"
-version = "0.27.0"
+version = "0.28.0"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rbspy-testdata"
@@ -1578,7 +1578,7 @@ checksum = "589f6da84c646204747d1270a2a5661ea66ed1cced2631d546fdfb155959f9ec"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "xtask"
-version = "0.27.0"
+version = "0.28.0"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "bindgen 0.71.1",
diff --git a/Cargo.toml b/Cargo.toml
index 7f896f4..2e3e1ec 100644
--- a/Cargo.toml
+++ b/Cargo.toml
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "rbspy"
-version = "0.27.0"
+version = "0.28.0"
 authors = ["Adam Jensen <acjensen@gmail.com>", "Julia Evans <julia@jvns.ca>"]
 description = "Sampling CPU profiler for Ruby"
 keywords = ["ruby", "profiler", "MRI"]
@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ memmap2 = "0.9.5"
 proc-maps = "0.4.0"
 prost = "0.13.4"
 rand = "0.8.3"
-rbspy-ruby-structs = { path = "ruby-structs", version="0.27.0" }
+rbspy-ruby-structs = { path = "ruby-structs", version="0.28.0" }
 remoteprocess = "0.5.0"
 semver = "1.0.24"
 serde = "1.0.216"
diff --git a/ruby-structs/Cargo.toml b/ruby-structs/Cargo.toml
index 597f8b0..881915a 100644
--- a/ruby-structs/Cargo.toml
+++ b/ruby-structs/Cargo.toml
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "rbspy-ruby-structs"
-version = "0.27.0"
+version = "0.28.0"
 authors = ["Adam Jensen <acjensen@gmail.com>", "Julia Evans <julia@jvns.ca>"]

Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>

    CI: Test against ruby 3.4.0
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 8 ++++----
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 2877df3..5aba715 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -46,22 +46,22 @@ jobs:
         include:
           - build: linux-x86_64
             os: ubuntu-22.04
-            ruby-version: 3.3.6
+            ruby-version: 3.4.0
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: linux-aarch64
             os: ubuntu-22.04
-            ruby-version: 3.3.6
+            ruby-version: 3.4.0
             run-tests: 'false'
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: macos
             os: macos-14
-            ruby-version: 3.3.6
+            ruby-version: 3.4.0
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
           - build: windows
             os: windows-2022
-            ruby-version: 3.3.5
+            ruby-version: 3.3.6
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
     steps:

    CI: Retire legacy 32-bit release binaries
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 6 ------

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index bcbcd51..2877df3 100644

+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -143,15 +143,9 @@ jobs:

       matrix:
         target:
-          - i686-musl
-          - armv7-musleabihf

           - x86_64-musl
         include:
-          - target: i686-musl
-            triple: i686-unknown-linux-musl

           - target: aarch64-musl
             triple: aarch64-unknown-linux-musl
           - target: x86_64-musl

patch:
commit c986d2d95576e89fddfb79d6fe87f8a53cd570ba
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Tue Dec 24 19:01:14 2024 -0500

    Add support for ruby 3.4.0 and 3.4.1
---
 .github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml      | 13 ++++++++++-
 .github/workflows/ruby-version-tests.yml |  3 ++-
 Cargo.lock                               | 34 ++++++++++++++++++++++++----
 ruby-structs/src/lib.rs                  |  3 +++
 src/core/ruby_version.rs                 | 38 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 src/core/supported_ruby_versions.rs      | 12 ++++++++++
 xtask/Cargo.toml                         |  2 +-
 7 files changed, 98 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml b/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
index 1c05ece..fa6f29a 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
@@ -56,7 +56,8 @@ jobs:
           3_0_0, 3_0_1, 3_0_2, 3_0_3, 3_0_4, 3_0_5, 3_0_6, 3_0_7,
           3_1_0, 3_1_1, 3_1_2, 3_1_3, 3_1_4, 3_1_5, 3_1_6,
           3_2_0, 3_2_1, 3_2_2, 3_2_3, 3_2_4, 3_2_5, 3_2_6,
-          3_3_0, 3_3_1, 3_3_2, 3_3_3, 3_3_4, 3_3_5, 3_3_6
+          3_3_0, 3_3_1, 3_3_2, 3_3_3, 3_3_4, 3_3_5, 3_3_6,
+          3_4_0, 3_4_1
         ]
         os: ["ubuntu-20.04"]
         target: ["x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"]
@@ -70,6 +71,16 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install Rust toolchain target
         run: |
           rustup target add ${{ matrix.target }}
+      - name: Install Ruby
+        if: startsWith(matrix.ruby-version, '2_4')
+        uses: ruby/setup-ruby@v1
+        with:
+          ruby-version: 2.7.0
+      - name: Install Ruby
+        if: startsWith(matrix.ruby-version, '2_4') == false
+        uses: ruby/setup-ruby@v1
+        with:
+          ruby-version: 3.3.6
       - name: Download xtask binary
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:

         assert_eq!(real_stack_trace_3_3_0(), stack_trace.unwrap().trace);
     }
+
+    #[cfg(target_pointer_width = "64")]
+    #[test]
+    fn test_get_ruby_stack_trace_3_4_0() {
+        let source = coredump_3_3_0();
+        let vm_addr = 0x7f7ff21f1868;
+        let global_symbols_addr = Some(0x7f7ff21e0c60);
+        let stack_trace = ruby_version::ruby_3_4_0::get_stack_trace::<CoreDump>(
+            0,
+            vm_addr,
+            global_symbols_addr,
+            &source,
+            0,
+            false,
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(real_stack_trace_3_3_0(), stack_trace.unwrap().trace);
+    }
+
+    #[cfg(target_pointer_width = "64")]

+        let global_symbols_addr = Some(0x7f7ff21e0c60);
+        let stack_trace = ruby_version::ruby_3_4_1::get_stack_trace::<CoreDump>(
+            0,
+            vm_addr,
+            global_symbols_addr,
+            &source,
+            0,
+            false,
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(real_stack_trace_3_3_0(), stack_trace.unwrap().trace);
+    }
 }

             get_stack_trace_fn: super::ruby_version::ruby_3_3_6::get_stack_trace,
             is_maybe_thread_fn: super::ruby_version::ruby_3_3_6::is_maybe_thread,
         }),
+        "3.4.0" => Ok(RubyVersion {
+            semver_version: Version::new(3, 4, 0),
+            get_execution_context_fn: super::ruby_version::ruby_3_4_0::get_execution_context,
+            get_stack_trace_fn: super::ruby_version::ruby_3_4_0::get_stack_trace,
+            is_maybe_thread_fn: super::ruby_version::ruby_3_4_0::is_maybe_thread,
+        }),
+        "3.4.1" => Ok(RubyVersion {
+            semver_version: Version::new(3, 4, 1),
+            get_execution_context_fn: super::ruby_version::ruby_3_4_1::get_execution_context,
+            get_stack_trace_fn: super::ruby_version::ruby_3_4_1::get_stack_trace,
+            is_maybe_thread_fn: super::ruby_version::ruby_3_4_1::is_maybe_thread,
+        }),
         _ => Err(format_err!("rbspy doesn't support Ruby {} yet. If this is a new patch-level version of Ruby, you can try using `--force-version` with the previous version number.", v)),
     }
 }

    CI: Test on ruby 3.3.4
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 8 ++++----
 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index b939768..58f7c99 100644

+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -46,22 +46,22 @@ jobs:
         include:
           - build: linux-x86_64
             os: ubuntu-22.04
-            ruby-version: 3.3.3
+            ruby-version: 3.3.4
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: linux-aarch64
             os: ubuntu-22.04
-            ruby-version: 3.3.3
+            ruby-version: 3.3.4
             run-tests: 'false'
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
           - build: macos
             os: macos-14
-            ruby-version: 3.3.3
+            ruby-version: 3.3.4
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
           - build: windows
             os: windows-2022
-            ruby-version: 3.3.2
+            ruby-version: 3.3.3
             run-tests: 'true'
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
     steps:

author: Adam Jensen
Adam Jensen
message: CI: Upgrade actions to fix deprecation warnings
patch:
commit f7270393f6082c1689ec2a015899e68ab4b51123
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Thu Apr 25 20:16:43 2024 -0400

    CI: Upgrade actions to fix deprecation warnings
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml                 | 10 +++++-----
 .github/workflows/coredump.yml           |  2 +-
 .github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml      | 10 +++++-----
 .github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml        |  2 +-
 .github/workflows/ruby-version-tests.yml |  4 ++--
 5 files changed, 14 insertions(+), 14 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index e0542c3..a19ded5 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -105,13 +105,13 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Upload Linux and macOS Binaries
         if: runner.os != 'windows'
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: rbspy-${{ matrix.target }}
           path: rbspy-${{ matrix.target }}
       - name: Upload Windows Binaries
         if: runner.os == 'windows'
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: rbspy-${{ matrix.target }}.exe
           path: rbspy-${{ matrix.target }}.exe
@@ -173,7 +173,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           cp target/*/release/rbspy rbspy-${{ matrix.triple }}
       - name: Upload Binaries
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: rbspy-${{ matrix.triple }}
           path: rbspy-${{ matrix.triple }}
@@ -264,7 +264,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           mv rbspy rbspy-x86_64-unknown-freebsd
       - name: Upload Binaries
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: rbspy-x86_64-unknown-freebsd
           path: rbspy-x86_64-unknown-freebsd
@@ -275,7 +275,7 @@ jobs:
     if: "startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')"
     needs: [build, build-freebsd, build-linux-cross]
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
+      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:
           path: raw-artifacts
       - name: Prepare binary archives
diff --git a/.github/workflows/coredump.yml b/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
index d7be3e2..82717ef 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/coredump.yml
@@ -55,7 +55,7 @@ jobs:
           gzip -9 ruby-coredump-${{ inputs.ruby-version }}
 
       - name: Upload core dump
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: ruby-coredump-${{ inputs.ruby-version }}.gz
           path: ruby-coredump-${{ inputs.ruby-version }}.gz
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml b/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
index 3594711..8cbba52 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Cargo Cache
-        uses: actions/cache@v3
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: |
             ~/.cargo/registry
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build xtask
         run: cargo xtask
       - name: Upload xtask binary
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: xtask
           path: target/release/xtask
@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           rustup target add ${{ matrix.target }}
       - name: Download xtask binary
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: xtask
       - name: Generate bindings for ruby ${{ matrix.ruby-version }}
@@ -87,7 +87,7 @@ jobs:
           git add ruby-structs/src
           cp $(git diff --name-only --staged | xargs) ../bindings-staging || echo "No new or modified files - bindings are up to date"
       - name: Upload Bindings
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           if-no-files-found: ignore
           name: bindings-${{ matrix.ruby-version }}
@@ -103,7 +103,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
             path: "rbspy"
             fetch-depth: 0
-      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
+      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
       - name: Copy bindings into place
         run: |
           cp bindings-*/ruby*.rs rbspy/ruby-structs/src/
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml b/.github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml
index 53c3907..157ead9 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ruby-latest.yml
@@ -42,7 +42,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           path: rbspy
       - name: Cargo Cache
-        uses: actions/cache@v3
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: |
             ~/.cargo/registry
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ruby-version-tests.yml b/.github/workflows/ruby-version-tests.yml
index f6e7103..70d4079 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ruby-version-tests.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ruby-version-tests.yml
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ jobs:
           echo "Test binary path is $test_binary_path"
           cp $test_binary_path rbspy-test
       - name: Upload binaries
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: rbspy-test
           path: rbspy-test
@@ -70,7 +70,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: ruby/setup-ruby@v1
         with:
           ruby-version: ${{ matrix.ruby_version }}
-      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
+      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
       - name: Run tests
         timeout-minutes: 5
         run: |

author: Adam Jensen
message: CI: Upgrade Swatinem/rust-cache to fix deprecation warnings
patch:
commit e5ffe3c80fff9200efd783d2ef3bb9edc8eb3da9
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sat Feb 24 22:32:02 2024 -0500

    CI: Upgrade Swatinem/rust-cache to fix deprecation warnings
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml       | 6 +++---
 .github/workflows/coredump.yml | 2 +-
 2 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index d4c5bd5..e0542c3 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sudo apt update -qq && sudo apt install -qq -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu
       - name: Cargo Cache
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.0

author: Adam Jensen
message: Adjust ractor memory scanning to be compatible with ruby 3.3+
patch:
commit 112c14b532a924d1277d02f5d2e5f5bdfa229eb6
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sat Feb 24 15:07:16 2024 -0500

    Adjust ractor memory scanning to be compatible with ruby 3.3+
    
    Ref: #387
---
 src/core/ruby_version.rs | 16 ++++++++++++----
 1 file changed, 12 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/src/core/ruby_version.rs b/src/core/ruby_version.rs
index d927a81..469bfb0 100644
--- a/src/core/ruby_version.rs
+++ b/src/core/ruby_version.rs
@@ -331,17 +331,25 @@ macro_rules! get_execution_context_from_vm(
             // important to jump as close as possible to the main_thread struct field before we
             // search, which is the purpose of the initial offset. The execution context pointer
             // is in the memory word just before main_thread (see rb_ractor_struct).
-            const ADDRESSES_TO_CHECK: usize = 64;
-            let initial_offset = 520; // Found through experiment
+            //
+            // The initial offsets were found by experimenting.
+            const INITIAL_OFFSET: usize =
+                if cfg!(target_os = "windows") {
+                    32
+                } else {
+                    48
+                };
+            const ADDRESSES_TO_CHECK: usize = 32;
+            let offset = INITIAL_OFFSET * std::mem::size_of::<usize>();
             let main_ractor_address = vm.ractor.main_ractor as usize;
             let candidate_addresses: [usize; ADDRESSES_TO_CHECK] =
-                source.copy_struct(main_ractor_address + initial_offset)
+                source.copy_struct(main_ractor_address + offset)
                     .context("couldn't read main ractor struct")?;
 
             candidate_addresses
             .iter()
             .enumerate()
-            .filter(|(_, &addr)| addr == vm.ractor.main_thread as usize)
+            .filter(|(idx, &addr)| *idx > 0 && addr == vm.ractor.main_thread as usize)
             .map(|(idx, _)| candidate_addresses[idx - 1])
             .filter(|&addr| addr != 0)
             .filter(|&addr| source.copy_struct::<rb_execution_context_struct>(addr as usize).is_ok())

author: Adam Jensen
message: Revert "Simplify how we find the execution context address"
patch:
commit fcaf7a373f7d4eac4810f170f74cbbacbce9e148
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Sat Feb 24 15:05:38 2024 -0500

    Revert "Simplify how we find the execution context address"
    
    This reverts commit 0ce5089b5c82fc5de65df07fb09bf47e609a6bb6. Although
    getting the EC directly from the main thread struct is simple and
    fast, it causes rbspy to miss context switches that are critical for
    sampling multithreaded programs like Puma.
    
    Ref: #387
---
 src/core/ruby_version.rs | 36 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++----
 1 file changed, 32 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/src/core/ruby_version.rs b/src/core/ruby_version.rs
index fdd42f9..d927a81 100644
--- a/src/core/ruby_version.rs
+++ b/src/core/ruby_version.rs
@@ -317,10 +317,38 @@ macro_rules! get_execution_context_from_vm(
             ruby_vm_address_ptr: usize,
             source: &T
         ) -> Result<usize> {
-            let vm_addr: usize = source.copy_struct(ruby_vm_address_ptr).context("couldn't read Ruby VM pointer")?;
-            let vm: rb_vm_struct = source.copy_struct(vm_addr as usize).context("couldn't read Ruby VM struct")?;
-            let main_thread: rb_thread_t = source.copy_struct(vm.ractor.main_thread as usize).context("couldn't read main thread struct")?;
-            return Ok(main_thread.ec as usize);
+            // This is a roundabout way to get the execution context address, but it helps us
+            // avoid platform-specific structures in memory (e.g. pthread types) that would
+            // require us to maintain separate ruby-structs bindings for each platform due to
+            // their varying sizes and alignments.
+            let vm_addr: usize = source.copy_struct(ruby_vm_address_ptr)
+                .context("couldn't read Ruby VM pointer")?;
+            let vm: rb_vm_struct = source.copy_struct(vm_addr as usize)
+                .context("couldn't read Ruby VM struct")?;
+
+            // Seek forward in the ractor struct, looking for the main thread's address. There
+            // may be other copies of the main thread address in the ractor struct, so it's
+            // important to jump as close as possible to the main_thread struct field before we
+            // search, which is the purpose of the initial offset. The execution context pointer
+            // is in the memory word just before main_thread (see rb_ractor_struct).
+            const ADDRESSES_TO_CHECK: usize = 64;
+            let initial_offset = 520; // Found through experiment
+            let main_ractor_address = vm.ractor.main_ractor as usize;
+            let candidate_addresses: [usize; ADDRESSES_TO_CHECK] =
+                source.copy_struct(main_ractor_address + initial_offset)
+                    .context("couldn't read main ractor struct")?;
+
+            candidate_addresses
+            .iter()
+            .enumerate()
+            .filter(|(_, &addr)| addr == vm.ractor.main_thread as usize)
+            .map(|(idx, _)| candidate_addresses[idx - 1])
+            .filter(|&addr| addr != 0)
+            .filter(|&addr| source.copy_struct::<rb_execution_context_struct>(addr as usize).is_ok())
+            .collect::<Vec<usize>>()
+            .first()
+            .map(|&addr| addr as usize)
+            .ok_or_else(|| format_err!("couldn't find execution context"))
         }
     )
 );

author: Adam Jensen
message: Freshen up new ruby version instructions
patch:
commit fcea2da7dc744da0d2427f885020a6c9edb56226
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Tue Jan 16 20:29:45 2024 -0500

    Freshen up new ruby version instructions
---
 NEW_RUBY_VERSION_CHECKLIST.md | 27 +++++++++------------------
 1 file changed, 9 insertions(+), 18 deletions(-)

diff --git a/NEW_RUBY_VERSION_CHECKLIST.md b/NEW_RUBY_VERSION_CHECKLIST.md
index 6625bc6..343c401 100644
--- a/NEW_RUBY_VERSION_CHECKLIST.md
+++ b/NEW_RUBY_VERSION_CHECKLIST.md
@@ -11,39 +11,30 @@ We use the `bindgen` tool to generate the glue code, also known as bindings, tha
 1. Add the new Ruby version(s) to the [ruby-bindings workflow](https://github.com/rbspy/rbspy/blob/main/.github/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml) and [ruby-version-tests workflow](https://github.com/rbspy/rbspy/blob/main/.github/workflows/ruby-version-tests.yml). ([example](https://github.com/rbspy/rbspy/commit/ba2508841476673c670350f87878fa7604ea6de1))
 1. Commit the change and push your branch
 1. Browse to the [ruby-bindings workflow](https://github.com/rbspy/rbspy/actions/workflows/ruby-bindings.yml), click "Run workflow", select your branch from the list, and click "Run workflow" again. (If you're working in a fork of the rbspy repository, then you'll need to run the workflow in your fork.)
-    * Under the hood, this workflow runs `cargo bindgen <ruby version tag>` for every version that rbspy supports, including the ones you just added. This process usually takes 5-10 minutes.
+    * Under the hood, this workflow runs `cargo xtask bindgen <ruby version tag>` for every version that rbspy supports, including the ones you just added. This process usually takes 5-10 minutes.
 1. When the build finishes, it creates a new branch with a name like "generate-ruby-bindings-42". Merge that branch into the branch you made earlier, or cherry-pick the commit into your branch.
 
 ## Update version-specific code paths
 
 With new bindings in hand, we can update rbspy itself to work with the new Ruby version.
 
+1. Open `src/core/supported_ruby_versions.rs` and add each new version to the list.
 1. Open `ruby-structs/src/lib.rs` and add a `mod` line for each new version.
-1. Open `src/core/initialize.rs` and add a line for each new version in the `is_maybe_thread_function` and `get_stack_trace_function` functions.
 1. Open `src/core/ruby_version.rs` and add a line for each new version. Please also add a test for each one (see next section).
 1. Commit your changes and push your branch
 1. Open a PR
 
-To understand where the lines need to be added and how to write the tests, you can use [this commit](https://github.com/rbspy/rbspy/commit/9d8fee1665c1b4fcdb007533307696d524964e84) as a template.
+To understand where the lines need to be added, you can use [this commit](https://github.com/rbspy/rbspy/commit/108667e6a049fcf7523a6e318361df6f7043eaf7) as a template.
 
 ## Update tests
 
-1. Run `infinite.rb` with the new Ruby version
-
-    ```sh
-    rbenv local X.Y.Z
-    ruby ci/ruby-programs/infinite.rb
-    ```
-1. In another terminal, run rbspy with RUST_LOG=debug to get VM and symbols addresses:
-
-    ```sh
-    cargo build && RUST_LOG=info ./target/debug/rbspy snapshot -p $(pgrep -fn infinite.rb)
-    ```
-1. Run `gcore -o ruby-coredump-X.Y.Z -p $(pgrep ruby)` to get a core dump
-1. Compress the core dump with `gzip -9 ruby-coredump-X.Y.Z`
+1. Browse to the [coredump workflow](https://github.com/rbspy/rbspy/actions/workflows/coredump.yml)
+1. Click "Run workflow" and enter the new Ruby version and your branch name
+1. When the workflow finishes, it will have a `ruby-coredump-x.y.z.gz` file in the list of artifacts
+1. Expand the "Inspect process" section of the build output to see the memory addresses of the VM and symbols
 1. Add the core dump to the rbspy-testdata repo
-1. Optional but recommended: edit rbspy's Cargo.toml to refer to your local copy of rbspy-testdata
-1. Add a test in `ruby_version.rs` (and a `real_stack_trace_X_Y_Z` func) that uses the new core dump
+1. Optional but recommended: edit rbspy's Cargo.toml to refer to your local copy of rbspy-testdata. This will make it easier to iterate on the test if it doesn't work the first time
+1. Add a test in `ruby_version.rs` (and a `real_stack_trace_X_Y_Z` func) that uses the new core dump. You'll need the info from the "Inspect process" section of the build output
 1. Verify that the test passes
 1. Publish a new version of rbspy-testdata
 1. Update the version of rbspy-testdata referenced in rbspy's Cargo.toml

patch:
commit f1228b5810614b3cd33565497bf0c95270bc211d
Author: Adam Jensen <adam@acj.sh>
Date:   Mon Jan 8 07:13:55 2024 -0500

    Migrate to Firecracker-based CI for FreeBSD
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 131 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++----------------
 1 file changed, 88 insertions(+), 43 deletions(-)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index cd7b6b4..749df29 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -184,58 +184,103 @@ jobs:
           path: rbspy-${{ matrix.triple }}
 
   build-freebsd:
-    name: Build
+    name: Build (FreeBSD)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
-    timeout-minutes: 30
-    strategy:
-      matrix:
-        box:
-          - freebsd-14
+
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
-      - name: Cache Vagrant box
-        uses: actions/cache@v3.0.4
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Checkout rbspy
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
-          path: .vagrant.d
-          key: ${{ matrix.box }}-vagrant-boxes-20231115-${{ hashFiles('ci/Vagrantfile') }}
-          restore-keys: |
-            ${{ matrix.box }}-vagrant-boxes-20231115-
-      - name: Cache Cargo and build artifacts
-        uses: actions/cache@v3.0.4
+          repository: rbspy/rbspy
+          path: rbspy
+          ref: main
+
+      - name: Install Rust
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@984d158d699777abbaa79de23de3134e60c187fa # stable branch
+
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2.7.0
         with:
-          path: build-artifacts.tar
-          key: ${{ matrix.box }}-cargo-20231115-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
-          restore-keys: |
-            ${{ matrix.box }}-cargo-20231115-
-      - name: Display CPU info
-        run: lscpu
-      - name: Install VM tools
-        run: |
-          sudo apt-get update -qq
-          sudo apt-get install -qq -o=Dpkg::Use-Pty=0 moreutils
-          sudo chronic apt-get install -qq -o=Dpkg::Use-Pty=0 vagrant virtualbox qemu libvirt-daemon-system
-      - name: Set up VM
-        shell: sudo bash {0}
+          workspaces: |
+            rbspy -> target
+
+      - name: Cross-compile rbspy
         run: |
-          vagrant plugin install vagrant-libvirt
-          vagrant plugin install vagrant-scp
+          wget -q -O cross https://github.com/acj/freebsd-firecracker/releases/download/v0.0.10/cross
+          chmod +x cross
+          mv cross /usr/local/bin/cross
 
-          ln -sf ci/Vagrantfile Vagrantfile
+          cd rbspy
+          cross build --release --target x86_64-unknown-freebsd
+          cp target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/rbspy rbspy
+          rm -rf target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/deps/rbspy-*
+          cross test --release --no-run --target x86_64-unknown-freebsd
+
+      - name: Launch Firecracker VM
+        uses: acj/freebsd-firecracker-action@v0.1.1
+        with:
+          verbose: false
+          pre-run: |
+            rm -rf .cargo
+            ln -s $HOME/.cargo .cargo
+
+            include_path="$(mktemp)"
+            cat <<EOF > $include_path
+            rbspy
+            rbspy/rbspy
+            rbspy/target
+            rbspy/target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd
+            rbspy/target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release
+            rbspy/target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/rbspy
+            rbspy/target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/deps
+            rbspy/target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/deps/rbspy-*
+            rbspy/ci
+            rbspy/ci/ruby-programs
+            rbspy/ci/ruby-programs/infinite.rb
+            rbspy/ci/ruby-programs/ruby_forks.rb
+            .cargo
+            .cargo/registry
+            .cargo/registry/src
+            .cargo/registry/src/index.*
+            .cargo/registry/src/index.*/rbspy-testdata-*
+            .cargo/registry/src/index.*/rbspy-testdata-*/data
+            .cargo/registry/src/index.*/rbspy-testdata-*/data/ruby-coredump-*.gz
+            EOF
+            
+            rsync -r -e "ssh" \
+              --relative \
+              --copy-links \
+              --include-from "$include_path" \
+              --exclude "*" \
+              . firecracker:
+            rm -f "$exclude_path"
+          run-in-vm: |
+            mkdir -p /home/runner
+            ln -s $(pwd)/.cargo /home/runner/.cargo
+
+            pkg install -y ruby
+
+            cd rbspy
+            ./rbspy --version
+
+            skip_tests="--skip core::ruby_spy::tests --skip sampler::tests"
+            failed=0
+            for testbin in $(find target/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/release/deps -type f -perm -u+x ! -name "*.d" -print); do
+              if ! $testbin $skip_tests; then
+                failed=1
+              fi
+            done
+
+            if [ $failed -ne 0 ]; then
+              exit 1
+            fi
+          post-run: ""
